title: Is A Commercial Real Estate Crisis Coming? These Experts Say No
text: People seem to think that commercial real estate is crashing. The truth is the opposite. Lower quality Class B and C office buildings are indeed suffering mightily right now, while Class A office is mainly suffering from negative sentiment.

title: REIT Earnings Preview: When The Tide Goes Out
text: REIT Earnings Preview: When The Tide Goes Out.

title: What Did These CEOs Of Companies With Crashing Stocks Get? A Raise
text: Investors took a big financial shellacking last year, with the S&P 500 falling nearly 20%. But many CEOs of the companies with shares dropping the most still got a raise.

title: Storage Wars
text: Storage REITs are the best-performing property sector this year after lagging in late 2022, lifted by surprisingly solid earnings results and a thawing of the previously icy-cold housing market. Storage demand is driven largely by housing activity – specifically, home sales and rental market turnover - and the recent moderation in mortgage rates has eased concern of a deepening housing recession.

title: Cracks Emerge In Jobs Market
text: U.S. equity markets snapped a three-week winning streak while benchmark interest rates dipped to seven-month lows after a critical slate of employment data revealed some cracking in the long-resilient labor markets. Following its strongest weekly advance in five months, the S&P 500 finished fractionally lower this week, while the Mid-Cap 400 and Small-Cap 600 each posted steeper declines of over 2.5%.

title: Extra Space Storage Acquires Life Storage: What This $12.7 Billion Deal Means for Investors
text: Extra Space Storage will acquire Life Storage in a $12.7 billion all-stock transaction. Life Storage will combine with Extra Space Storage in the second half of 2023.

title: Extra Space Storage: Looking To Add Extra Space
text: Extra Space Storage decided to join the bidding war for Life Storage. The all-stock deal should alleviate leverage concerns, with some synergies seen as a result of the potential tie-up.

title: Why Extra Space Storage Is One Of My Favorite Dividend Stocks
text: After the decision to buy Life Storage, Extra Space Storage is about to become the biggest self-storage REIT in the United States. The company offers the perfect mix between growth and value, thanks to its superior business model that should allow for outperforming growth in the years ahead.

title: Extra Space Storage (EXR) Soars 3.7%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
text: Extra Space Storage (EXR) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions could translate into further price increase in the near term.

title: ALERT: Rowley Law PLLC is Investigating Proposed Acquisition of Life Storage, Inc.
text: NEW YORK , April 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Rowley Law PLLC is investigating potential securities law violations by Life Storage, Inc. (NYSE: LSI) and its board of directors concerning the proposed acquisition of the company by Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE: EXR). Stockholders will receive 0.8950 shares of Extra Space Storage common stock for each share of Life Storage stock that they hold.

title: SHAREHOLDER INVESTIGATION: Halper Sadeh LLC Investigates HSKA, LSI, EXR, DFFN

title: Extra Space Storage Stock Slides After Billion-Dollar Merger
text: Extra Space Storage Inc (NYSE:EXR) is attracting attention today, on news that the real estate investment trust (REIT) is acquiring Life Storage Inc (LSI) for $12.7 billion to become the largest U.S. self-storage space operator by store count.

title: Extra Space Storage to acquire Life Storage in $12.7B all-stock deal
text: Extra Space Storage will acquire Life Storage in an all-stock transaction valued at about $12.7 billion creating a storage operator with a total enterprise value of $46 billion and a market capitalization of $36 billion. The companies said in a joint statement that Life Storage shareholders will receive 0.8950 of an Extra Space share for each Life Storage share they own, representing a total consideration of approximately $145.82 per share based on Extra Space's share price close on March 31, 2023.

title: LSI Stock Alert: What to Know as Extra Space Storage Acquires LifeStorage
text: LifeStorage (NYSE: LSI ) stock is climbing higher on Monday after Extra Space Storage (NYSE: EXR ) agreed to acquire the company. This agreement has Extra Space Storage exchanging its own shares for shares of LifeStorage stock.

title: EXR Stock Alert: Halper Sadeh LLC Is Investigating Whether the Merger of Extra Space Storage Inc. Is Fair to Shareholders
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Halper Sadeh LLC, an investor rights law firm, is investigating whether the merger of Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE: EXR) and Life Storage, Inc. is fair to Extra Space shareholders. Under the terms of the agreement, Life Storage shareholders will receive 0.8950 of an Extra Space share for each Life Storage share they own. At closing, Extra Space shareholders are expected to own approximately 65% of the combined company. Halper Sadeh encourages Extra Space shareholders to click here to learn more about their legal rights and options or contact Daniel Sadeh or Zachary Halper at (212) 763-0060 or sadeh@halpersadeh.com or zhalper@halpersadeh.com. The investigation concerns whether Extra Space and its board violated the federal securities laws and/or breached their fiduciary duties to shareholders by failing to, among other things: (1) obtain the best possible consideration for Extra Space shareholders; and (2) disclose all material information necessary for Extra Space shareholders to adequately assess and value the merger consideration. On behalf of Extra Space shareholders, Halper Sadeh LLC may seek increased consideration for shareholders, additional disclosures and information concerning the proposed transaction, or other relief and benefits. Halper Sadeh encourages Extra Space shareholders to click here to learn more about their legal rights and options or contact Daniel Sadeh or Zachary Halper at (212) 763-0060 or sadeh@halpersadeh.com or zhalper@halpersadeh.com. Halper Sadeh LLC represents investors all over the world who have fallen victim to securities fraud and corporate misconduct. Our attorneys have been instrumental in implementing corporate reforms and recovering millions of dollars on behalf of defrauded investors. Attorney Advertising. Prior results do not guarantee a similar outcome.

title: Extra Space Storage to acquire Life Storage in all-stock deal with enterprise value of about $47 billion
text: Extra Space Storage Inc. EXR, +2.58% said Monday it has agreed to merge with Life Storage Inc. LSI, +2.24% in an all-stock deal with a total enterprise value of about $47 billion. Under the terms of the deal, Salt Lake City, Utah-based Extra Space Storage will pay 0.8950 of its shares for each Life Storage share, equal to about $145.82 per share, based on the stock's closing price on Friday.

title: Extra Space Storage & Life Storage Combine to Form the Preeminent Storage Operator
text: Creates the largest storage operator and one of the largest REITs in the RMZ SALT LAKE CITY and BUFFALO, N.Y. , April 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE: EXR) ("Extra Space") and Life Storage, Inc. (NYSE: LSI) ("Life Storage") announced today that the two companies have entered into a definitive merger agreement by which Extra Space will acquire Life Storage in an all-stock transaction.

title: Extra Space Storage to Combine With Life Storage
text: The $12.7 billion deal would create the largest storage-facility operator in the U.S. by number of locations.
